_comment: Curated narrator catalog for the TTS sidecar. Each voice needs a 3-10s mono reference clip at `file` (next to this JSON) plus its EXACT transcription in `ref_text` (required: the sidecar runs with load_asr=False, so it never transcribes the clip itself). A voice whose clip is missing is reported `ready:false` and rejected at synth time. Use public-domain / CC0 audio only (e.g. LibriVox). See README.md.
